commit.message: HDFS-15211. EC: File write hangs during close in case of Exception during updatePipeline. Contributed by Ayush Saxena.
HDFS-15211. EC: File write hangs during close in case of Exception during updatePipeline. Contributed by Ayush Saxena.
MAPREDUCE-7237. Supports config the shuffle's path cache related parameters (#1397)

verification.payload:
tree 463081b5d9b764333531d323d7d8e9e7cb953e0f
parent 1d772dc5429bfffa015a1209e6f4a864505c871a
author Wanqiang Ji <wanqiang.ji@gmail.com> 1584325716 +0800
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1584325716 +0900

MAPREDUCE-7237. Supports config the shuffle's path cache related parameters (#1397)

files.patch:
@@ -1266,6 +1266,29 @@
   </description>
 </property>
 
+<property>
+  <name>mapreduce.shuffle.pathcache.max-weight</name>
+  <value>10485760</value>
+  <description>The maximum total weight of entries the cache may contain.
+  </description>
+</property>
+
+<property>
+  <name>mapreduce.shuffle.pathcache.expire-after-access-minutes</name>
+  <value>5</value>
+  <description>The length of time after an entry is last accessed that it
+    should be automatically removed.
+  </description>
+</property>
+
+<property>
+  <name>mapreduce.shuffle.pathcache.concurrency-level</name>
+  <value>16</value>
+  <description>Uses the concurrency level to create a fixed number of hashtable
+    segments, each governed by its own write lock.
+  </description>
+</property>
+
 <property>
   <name>mapreduce.job.reduce.shuffle.consumer.plugin.class</name>
   <value>org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.reduce.Shuffle</value>
